description: Read-only specialist for high-performance tables, per-column filters, lightweight virtualization, and loading states.

capabilities.review_tables: Verify column filters, horizontal scrolling, active-filter indicators and table performance
capabilities.review_loading_states: Verify loading, empty and error states
capabilities.review_accessibility: Verify keyboard and accessible feedback for table controls

review_history.summary: DataTable aprobado sin bloqueantes: scroll horizontal, filtros agrupados e indicador de filtro activo verificados. Riesgo bajo: DataTable.tsx está próximo al límite de 550 líneas.
